note: Dual model (independently_created:true AND in someone's created_by). Must be judged ONLY on its standalone factory; the via-owner relationship must not affect the verdict.
step2_audit_entry:
- name: Branch
  independently_created: true
  creation_file: src/branches/branch.service.ts
  creation_function: BranchService.create
  side_effects:
    - Writes a default BranchSettings row
  created_by:
    - owner: Application
      via: ApplicationsService.createApplication
      why: "Every new Application needs a default main branch, created inline in the same transaction."

helper_section: (The factory does not call an external helper.)
